name: Google Vertex AI MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server for Google Vertex AI — Google Cloud's enterprise ML platform providing access to Gemini models, PaLM, Imagen, and hundreds of third-party models (Llama, Mistral, Claude via Model Garden). Enables AI agents to call Vertex AI models with enterprise compliance, GCP IAM, VPC integration, and Google's data processing commitments.
use_cases: Calling Gemini Pro/Ultra models via enterprise GCP infrastructure from AI agent workflows
Running ML predictions and batch inference jobs from data science pipeline agents
Accessing Google's Model Garden for model discovery and testing from ML platform agents
Managing Vertex AI model endpoints and feature store from MLOps automation agents
not_for: Consumer AI applications (Vertex is enterprise GCP, not AI Studio for consumers)
Simple LLM inference without enterprise compliance requirements (use AI Studio)
best_when: A GCP-centric enterprise wants foundation model access with Google's enterprise compliance (HIPAA, FedRAMP), data residency controls, and VPC private networking for AI agents.
avoid_when: You're not on GCP — Vertex AI requires GCP infrastructure. FINANCIAL RISK: GCP billing for LLM tokens and ML compute.

auth.notes: Google Cloud IAM authentication via service account or Workload Identity Federation. Use minimal IAM roles (aiplatform.user for inference). ADC (Application Default Credentials) for local development.

pricing.free_tier_limits: $300 GCP free trial credits for new accounts
pricing.paid_tiers: Per token pricing: Gemini 1.5 Pro ~$3.50/1M input tokens; Pro Flash ~$0.075/1M
pricing.notes: GCP billing account required for production. Gemini Flash is very cost-effective. Training and fine-tuning have separate costs.

performance.rate_limits: Vertex AI rate limits per project and region; quota requests for higher limits

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: GCP billing for LLM tokens and compute — implement budget alerts
Google Cloud IAM is complex — service account key management requires careful governance
Vertex AI quotas must be requested per region — default quotas may be insufficient
Model availability varies by region — check model availability before deployment
ADC credentials must be properly configured for local vs. production environments
agent_readiness.security_notes: FINANCIAL RISK: GCP LLM and compute costs. Enterprise compliance (HIPAA, FedRAMP, SOC1/2, GDPR). GCP IAM with service accounts. Data residency by region. VPC support.

security_score_components.security_notes: Enterprise AI on GCP with HIPAA, FedRAMP, SOC1/2, GDPR. Service account IAM. VPC support. Data residency by GCP region.
